notes: BAR policy tree for the Wardline reference implementation. Seven reviewer roles, unanimous aggregation rule, explicit OpenRouter-backed Claude Opus 4.6 model pin, and a versioned shared reviewer skill pack loaded from the policy tree. Hash reflects all fixes: check_stability requires exactly 3 runs (§5), per-reviewer vote comparison is only applied to pass aggregates (§5 condition 2), the published model pin names the LiteLLM/OpenRouter provider path directly, reviewer citation discipline lives in hash-bound skill-pack assets, reviewer outputs use an explicit CITATIONS section, strong verdicts require surviving normalized citation tokens, and provider timeout/retry guardrails are now policy-bound inputs. policy_hash computed per docs/governance/bar-review-pipeline.md §7.
